tasks.title: Expose rate-limit headers on 429s
tasks.body: Return `RateLimit-Limit`, `RateLimit-Remaining`, `RateLimit-Reset`, and `Retry-After` from every enforced rejection. Preserve the existing API error envelope and request id.

tasks.title: Dashboard: usage graph for API keys
tasks.body: Plot daily requests by API key with plan quota and projected overage. Show when data was last aggregated.

tasks.title: Rotate webhook signing secrets
tasks.body: Support overlapping webhook secrets for seven days and expose the active secret prefix in settings.

tasks.title: Backfill invoice-grade usage ledger
tasks.body: Import the current billing period from request logs with deterministic event ids and a distinct backfill source marker.

tasks.title: Alert on Redis fail-open decisions
tasks.body: Page API on-call when fail-open exceeds 0.1% of authenticated requests for ten minutes. Link the alert to the rollout runbook.

tasks.title: Add custom domains to link analytics
tasks.body: Include custom-domain hostnames in click breakdowns without increasing the analytics query count.

tasks.title: Make webhook retry timing deterministic
tasks.body: Remove endpoint-scoped retry counters, inject scheduling time, and add an interleaving regression test.

tasks.title: Document API key rotation procedure
tasks.body: Publish the overlapping-key rotation flow, grace periods, audit events, and emergency revocation steps.

tasks.title: Reduce redirect endpoint p95 below 25 ms
tasks.body: Cache active link destinations in Redis and preserve click tracking through the async event queue.

demo-task-1.body: Please keep the reset value in whole seconds; two customer SDKs currently parse it as an integer.
Done. `RateLimit-Reset` and `Retry-After` both round up, and the middleware test covers a 1.2 second reset as `2`.
